OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_REPORT_HUB_BASE_URL.description: The base URL for the RST Cloud API.

RST_REPORT_HUB_RETRY_DELAY.description: The delay in seconds between retry attempts.

RST_REPORT_HUB_RETRY_ATTEMPTS.description: The number of retry attempts for failed requests.

RST_REPORT_HUB_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: The start date for importing reports (format: YYYYMMDD).

RST_REPORT_HUB_FETCH_INTERVAL.description: The interval in seconds between each fetch cycle.

RST_REPORT_HUB_LANGUAGE.description: The language of the reports to fetch (e.g., eng).

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: If true, observables will be created from indicators.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_RELATED_TO.description: If true, related-to relationships will be included in the bundle.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: If true, custom TTPs not yet in MITRE ATT&CK will be included.

RST_REPORT_HUB_REPORT_LABELS_DISABLED.description: Comma-separated list of labels to exclude from reports (lowercase, numbers, underscores only).

RST_REPORT_HUB_SET_DETECTION_FLAG.description: If true, the x_opencti_detection flag will be set to true for indicators.
